scripts.test:oracle: rm -rf test/accounting/state && mkdir -p test/accounting/state && vitest run test/accounting/oracle --reporter=json --outputFile=test/accounting/state/oracle-results.json
scripts.test:backend: node e2e-bridge/server.mjs & BRIDGE_PID=$!; sleep 1; vitest run test/accounting/backend --reporter=json --outputFile=test/accounting/state/backend-results.json; RESULT=$?; kill $BRIDGE_PID 2>/dev/null; exit $RESULT
scripts.test:accounting:fast: npm run test:oracle && npm run test:backend && npm run test:consolidate
scripts.test:accounting:full: sh -c 'RC=0; npm run test:oracle || RC=$?; npm run test:backend || RC=$?; npm run test:e2e || RC=$?; npm run test:consolidate; exit $RC'
scripts.test:accounting:fast-scan-no-fix: node e2e-bridge/server.mjs & BRIDGE_PID=$!; sleep 1; npx tsx test/accounting/runners/fast-scan-no-fix.ts; RESULT=$?; kill $BRIDGE_PID 2>/dev/null; exit $RESULT
scripts.test:accounting:scan-next: node e2e-bridge/server.mjs & BRIDGE_PID=$!; sleep 1; npx tsx test/accounting/runners/fast-scan-no-fix.ts --one; RESULT=$?; kill $BRIDGE_PID 2>/dev/null; exit $RESULT
scripts.test:accounting:scan-scenario: node e2e-bridge/server.mjs & BRIDGE_PID=$!; sleep 1; npx tsx test/accounting/runners/fast-scan-no-fix.ts --scenario; RESULT=$?; kill $BRIDGE_PID 2>/dev/null; exit $RESULT
scripts.test:accounting:final-verify: npm run test:accounting:real-tauri && npm run test:accounting:real-report
scripts.test:accounting:real-tauri-full-71: cd src-tauri && cargo test accounting_real_backend_full_71 --features accounting-test-support -- --nocapture
scripts.test:accounting:final-full-verify: npm run test:accounting:real-tauri-full-71 && npm run test:accounting:real-full-71-report
scripts.test:accounting:available: python3 scripts/accounting_runtime_scenarios.py && python3 scripts/check_installment_profit.py && python3 scripts/accounting_audit.py src-tauri/fjr_alwadi_data.db && python3 scripts/test_vin_integrity.py src-tauri/fjr_alwadi_data.db && python3 scripts/test_session_gate.py src-tauri/fjr_alwadi_data.db && python3 scripts/check_rust_structure.py
scripts.test:print-fixture: esbuild scripts/render_print_fixture.tsx --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=scripts/.render_print_fixture.mjs && node scripts/.render_print_fixture.mjs /tmp/fajr_print_layout_fixture.pdf && python3 scripts/verify_print_fixture.py /tmp/fajr_print_layout_fixture.pdf; RC=$?; rm -f scripts/.render_print_fixture.mjs /tmp/fajr_print_layout_fixture.pdf; exit $RC
